startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: URLs to start scraping from. Defaults to the Terramar Brands product catalog.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of requests. Only ~10 API calls are needed for the full catalog.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Not required — the API is public with no rate limiting.
